chunks.title: The Command to Spy
chunks.reason: Yahweh instructs Moses to send spies and Moses executes the command.

chunks.title: Names of the Spies
chunks.reason: A complete catalog listing the twelve leaders sent from each tribe.

chunks.title: Moses' Instructions to Spies
chunks.reason: Moses gives specific directives on what to observe and collect.

chunks.title: The Journey of the Spies
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the spies traveling the land and gathering fruit.

chunks.title: The Spies' Report
chunks.reason: The group returns to report on the land, including Caleb's encouragement and the majority's fearful assessment.
